source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/04_2G & 3G (A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW)/▶ CE MDR/231031 보완/A-TCF-5-156 Test Reports (rev.1).pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Technical documentation section summarizing test reports and compliance results for A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports technical documentation by listing applied standards, laboratories, report numbers, issue dates, and compliance results for safety, EMC, wireless EMC, biocompatibility, imaging performance, transportation, and IPX6 testing.
keyPoints: All listed products are inspected under the quality management system before market placement and tested according to applied standards.
IEC 60601-1 basic safety and essential performance testing was reported as compliant by Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. for A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW.
EMC and wireless EMC testing was reported as compliant for the listed models by Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.
Biocompatibility testing for the deco sheet was reported as compliant by Korea Testing Laboratory.
EN 62220-1-1:2015 digital X-ray imaging device testing was performed in-house by H&abyz Co., Ltd.
Transportation environment and IPX6 enclosure protection tests were reported as compliant by SGS Korea Co., Ltd.

entities.name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: Confidential This document is strictly private, confidential and intended solely for the use of H&abyz Co., Ltd.

evidence.claim: The document is Technical Documentation Document No. A-TCF-5-156, Rev. No. 1, titled 9. Test Reports, with revision date October 20, 2023.
evidence.evidenceText: Technical Documentation Document No. A-TCF-5-156 Rev. No. 1 9. Test Reports Rev. Date October 20, 2023

evidence.claim: Products are inspected under the quality management system before market placement and tested according to applied standards.
evidence.evidenceText: All our products are subjected to be inspected in accordance with our quality management system before the products are placed on the market. Also, the devices are tested in accordance with the applied standard.

evidence.claim: IEC 60601-1 testing for A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW was performed by Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. under report REP001842, issued 2022-11-08, with compliance result.
evidence.evidenceText: Applied Standard IEC 60601-1: 2005 /A1:2012 (3.1rd, CB Scheme) Laboratory Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. Model A1717MCW, A1417MCW, F1417MCW Issued date of the test report 2022-11-08 Test Report No. REP001842 Test result Compliance
evidence.pageTarget: IEC 60601-1 Basic Safety and Essential Performance

evidence.claim: EN 60601-1-2 EMC testing was performed by Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. for A1417MCW, F1417MCW, and A1717MCW with compliance result.
evidence.evidenceText: Applied Standard EN 60601-1-2:2014 /A1:2021 Laboratory Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. Model A1417MCW, F1417MCW A1717MCW Issued date of the test report 2022-10-04 2022-10-04 Test Report No. NK-22-E-0810 NK-22-E-0813 Test result Compliance

evidence.claim: Wireless EMC testing used EN 301 489-1 V2.2.3, EN 301 489-3 V2.1.1, and EN 301 489-17 V3.2.4, with compliance result.
evidence.evidenceText: Applied Standard EN 301 489-1 V2.2.3 EN 301 489-3 V2.1.1 EN 301 489-17 V3.2.4 Laboratory Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. Model A1417MCW, F1417MCW A1717MCW Issued date of the test report 2022-10-04 2022-10-04 Test Report No. NK-22-E-0812 NK-22-E-0815 Test result Compliance

evidence.claim: Biocompatibility testing for A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW deco sheet was performed by Korea Testing Laboratory under ISO 10993 standards with compliance result.
evidence.evidenceText: Applied Standard ISO 10993-1:2018 ISO 10993-5: 2009 ISO 10993-10:2010 Laboratory Korea Testing Laboratory Model A1717MCW, A1417MCW, F1417MCW Issued date of the test report 2020-04-17 Test Report No. 20-007374-01-1 Test result Compliance

evidence.claim: EN 62220-1-1:2015 digital X-ray imaging device testing was performed in-house by H&abyz Co., Ltd. for A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW.
evidence.evidenceText: Applied Standard EN 62220-1-1:2015 Laboratory In-house testing (H&abyz Co., Ltd.) Model A1717MCW, A1417MCW, F1417MCW Issued date of the test report 2022-11-21 Test Report No. A-TCF-5-116 Test result (Refer to summary)

evidence.claim: Transportation environment testing for A1717MCW was performed by SGS Korea Co., Ltd. under manufacturer-set conditions with compliance result.
evidence.evidenceText: Applied Standard (conditions set forth by the manufacturer.) Laboratory SGS Korea Co., Ltd. Model A1717MCW Issued date of the test report 2023-01-12 Test Report No. SGS-R23-0128-EN00 Test result Compliance

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is indicated by source metadata/path as CE/MDR but is not stated in the document body.
EMC standard text conflicts between the test results table and summary: EN 60601-1-2:2015 /A1:2021 appears in the table, while EN 60601-1-2:2014 /A1:2021 appears in the summary.
The table lists A1717MCW EMC applied standard as EN 60601-1-2015 /A1:2021, which may be an OCR or source formatting issue because the section is for Part 1-2 electromagnetic disturbances.
Transportation environment and IPX6 sections state applied standard as conditions set forth by the manufacturer in the summaries, while the test results table lists IEC 60529 for IPX6.
